summary: Iteration 52 - Backend testing of Round Trip Order Creation. All 8 tests PASSED. Features verified: 1) POST /api/orders/create with is_round_trip=true creates 2 separate orders + 1 receipt. 2) Response includes order_id, return_order_id, trip_group_id, receipt_number, order_number, return_order_number. 3) Single trip orders work correctly (backwards compatible). 4) Receipt has both order_ids linked in an array.

single_trip_backwards_compatible_tests.test_single_trip_order_creation: PASS - No is_round_trip flag creates single order without return_order_id/trip_group_id/receipt_number
single_trip_backwards_compatible_tests.test_single_trip_with_is_round_trip_fals: PASS - Explicit is_round_trip=false creates single order

round_trip_order_tests.test_round_trip_order_creates_two_orders: PASS - Creates 2 orders + 1 receipt with correct response fields
round_trip_order_tests.test_round_trip_response_structure: PASS - All required fields present: order_id, return_order_id, trip_group_id, receipt_number, order_number, return_order_number, total_amount

database_verification_tests.test_verify_both_orders_exist_in_orders_: PASS - Both outbound (trip_leg='outbound') and return (trip_leg='return') orders exist with same trip_group_id

non_travel_service_tests.test_round_trip_ignored_for_non_travel_s: PASS - is_round_trip=true ignored for hotel/other service types

receipt_verification.receipt_has_both_order_ids: PASS - Receipt order_ids array contains both outbound and return order IDs

features_verified.round_trip_creates_2_orders: VERIFIED - POST /api/orders/create with is_round_trip=true and service_type='travel' creates 2 separate orders
features_verified.round_trip_creates_1_receipt: VERIFIED - Single receipt created in receipts collection with order_ids array linking both orders
features_verified.round_trip_response_structure: VERIFIED - Response includes: success, message, order_id, return_order_id, trip_group_id, receipt_number, order_number, return_order_number, total_amount
features_verified.orders_have_trip_metadata: VERIFIED - Both orders have trip_group_id and trip_leg ('outbound' or 'return')
features_verified.price_splitting: VERIFIED - Total amount split between outbound and return orders (default: 50/50, or custom via outbound_price)
features_verified.single_trip_backwards_compatible: VERIFIED - Single trip orders without is_round_trip work as before
features_verified.non_travel_ignores_round_trip: VERIFIED - is_round_trip flag only applies to service_type='travel'

critical_code_review_comments: Round trip logic correctly checks both is_round_trip=true AND service_type='travel' before creating 2 orders
Receipt collection properly stores order_ids as array for round trips
trip_group_id correctly links outbound and return orders
Order splitting properly divides total_amount between legs with support for custom outbound_price
seed_data_creation: Test orders and receipts created and cleaned up during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 52 verified round trip order creation for travel service. POST /api/orders/create with booking_details.is_round_trip=true creates 2 separate orders linked by trip_group_id, plus 1 receipt in receipts collection with order_ids array. Backend response includes all required fields. Single trip orders remain backwards compatible. All 8 backend tests passed.
